text: Reliable. Wait times are usually under 5 minutes. Safety features are good. Surge pricing is frustrating.
Best ride app. Safety features like trip sharing. Driver quality is good. Payment options are flexible.
Surge pricing is opaque. Felt ripped off. Wait time was okay. App is reliable.
Drivers are friendly. Wait time is good. Safety features are solid. Pricing transparency could improve.
Great driver quality. App is reliable. Safe rides. Good payment options.
Fastest pickup. Upfront pricing, no surge. Best value. Driver quality is excellent.
Transparent pricing. Wait time is short. App works well. Safety features are good.
Best value. No surprise surge. Fast pickups. Driver quality is high.
Decent app. Wait times vary. Driver quality is okay. Pricing is okay.
Good in Europe. Driver quality is good. Payment options work. App reliability is fine.
Cheap. Wait time is okay. Driver quality varies. Payment options are good.
Good value. Driver quality is good. Safety features are adequate. App is reliable.
Safety features are best in class. Wait time is good. Surge pricing is the main complaint.
Driver quality is excellent. Safety features are good. Pricing transparency needs work.
Upfront pricing. Fastest pickup. Best value. Switched from Uber.
